visual-anti-patterns.notes: Soft pink-to-blue gradient background visible on landing and gallery pages counts as one anti-pattern; no orbs, no nested cards, no clutter, text sizes adequate.

visual-child-friendly.notes: Emoji-based object palette, friendly Sparky AI buddy, big colorful buttons, and minimal text density are well-suited for children; small icon-only undo/redo buttons slightly reduce the score.

visual-consistency.notes: Purple/magenta heading color and rounded card radii are consistent, but button styles drift across pages (pink gradient on landing, solid purple on gallery, green on builder toolbar).

visual-accessibility.notes: Good text-on-white contrast and visible selection rings on theme picker, but undo/redo and close buttons are icon-only without labels and no responsive-width evidence is shown.
